title: OxidizeAnyway
description: Lightweight Fabric mod that makes all copper oxidize as if fully spaced - removing the proximity slowdown while preserving vanilla timing.
body:
# What does this mod do?
Makes all copper oxidize as if fully spaced - removes the neighbor-density slowdown while keeping vanilla timing and behavior.

## Highlights
- Works for every oxidizable copper variant: blocks, cut blocks, slabs, stairs, doors, trapdoors, grates, bulbs.
- Vanilla feel preserved: uses the normal random-tick pacing and stage multipliers.
- Waxing & scraping unchanged (waxed copper won’t age; axes/honeycomb behave normally).
- Multiplayer-safe: server or client; no config required.
- Lightweight: no Fabric API; touches only the oxidation logic.

## Compatibility

**Minecraft:** 1.21.8 - 1.21.11 (Fabric)
**Requires:** Fabric Loader (no Fabric API)

Likely incompatible with mods that replace copper oxidation / degradable behavior.

## Quick test
Place a dense 10×10 of copper next to a spaced checkerboard; both should age at a similar pace.
/gamerule randomTickSpeed still affects overall speed (just like vanilla).

## Known issues
None reported yet. If you see odd interactions with other oxidation-tweaking mods, please open an issue on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/pYwVfNfmsP).

Enjoy building with copper without the spacing tax!
